original_statement: after the olympic games, what was the next competition he participated in?
mutated_statement: after the event, what was the next something he was involved with?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 名词泛化/占位符替换 + 动作动词替换/语态变化: “the olympic games” 被替换为更模糊的“the event” | “competition” 被替换为占位词“something” | “he participated in” 改为更模糊的被动表达“he was involved with” (the olympic games → the event | competition → something | he participated in → he was involved with)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述识别关键信息：judge_thought写道“Interpreting ‘after the event’ as the event in the first row (2007 Pan Arab Games...)，the next competition... is the 2008 Asian Indoor Championships”，并在initial_judge的chain中直接返回具体答案。Agent的具体表现是：没有指出问题的模糊性或不确定性（未使用ambiguous、unclear、无法确定等词），也未向用户请求澄清；相反，直接按照自己的假设（将“the event”对应表格第一行）给出明确答案并标记为[Correct]。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”：Agent未识别或不表明问题存在歧义，直接以确定性的方式处理并回答。
